original_caption_excerpt:
38 trillion microbes live inside your gut. Most people have never checked in on a single one, yet they’re influencing more than you think from your energy, mood, and immunity.

@mitohealthapp x @tiny.
adapted_hook: 38 trilhões de micróbios decidem seu humor. *Você* nunca os checou.
adapted_subline: O intestino orquestra energia, imunidade e clareza mental. A maioria ignora — e paga o preço sem saber.
visual_prompt: Editorial 9:16 poster (1080x1920px), ultra-minimal luxury composition. Background: deep forest green #000F08, matte finish, subtle organic gradient texture suggesting microscopic depth (very soft, barely perceptible). Centered vertical layout: text block occupies center 60% of canvas, top 20% and bottom 20% are clean empty forest green space. Typography: DM Sans Light, off-white #f8fffc, generous letter-spacing. Headline rendered in image (centered, large): '38 trilhões de micróbios' on line one, 'decidem seu humor.' on line two, with the word 'Você' on a third line rendered in italic DM Sans Light Italic in gold #C89136. Below, smaller subline in off-white at 60% opacity, DM Sans Light: 'O intestino orquestra energia, imunidade e clareza mental.' Single thin gold #C89136 hairline divider (1px, 40px wide) separating headline from subline. Bottom 15% completely empty forest green space reserved for logo overlay — DO NOT draw any logo, watermark, badge, rectangle, or placeholder. Aesthetic: Aesop apothecary meets clinical precision. Anti: pure white, red, amber, orange, neon, drop shadows, bevels, serif fonts (no Georgia, Playfair, Times), people, faces, hands, lab coats, medical icons, gut illustrations, bacteria graphics, emoji, hashtags.
caption_pt: 38 trilhões de micróbios habitam seu intestino. Eles modulam humor, imunidade e energia em silêncio — e a maioria nunca olhou pra um sequer. O eixo intestino-cérebro deixou de ser hipótese. Virou biomarcador.
why_this_works: O ICP brasileiro premium responde a dado concreto + reframing existencial ('decidem seu humor') sem cair em wellness genérico. A palavra-pivô 'Você' em italic gold cria interpelação direta, mantendo a restrição Aesop sem perder a urgência Mito.
